description: Yarn Berry (>=2) equivalent of tasks/base-private-reg-setup. Configure a private npm registry at user level on the Renovate runner by writing to ~/.yarnrc.yml via `yarn config set -H`. Merges into the postUpgradeTasks of Otter's built-in task presets (tasks/base, tasks/otter-ng-update, tasks/sdk-regenerate) so that their `yarn install`, `yarn exec schematics ...` and `yarn run spec:upgrade` commands can authenticate against the private registry. MUST be extended BEFORE those task presets. arg0: scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//repository.rnd.amadeus.net/api/npm/npm/'); used to derive the registry URL ('https:{{arg0}}') and as the npmRegistries key ('{{arg0}}'). arg1: name of the environment variable holding the Yarn-Berry auth value (base64 of 'user:password') to be used as npmAuthIdent (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables / allowedEnv. If your token is a bearer token rather than basic auth, replace 'npmAuthIdent' with 'npmAuthToken' in this preset. Writes to ~/.yarnrc.yml on the runner so nothing is committed. References: Yarn settings (npmRegistryServer, npmRegistries, npmAuthIdent, npmAuthToken, enableScripts) https://yarnpkg.com/configuration/yarnrc ; `yarn config set -H` with bracket-path syntax https://yarnpkg.com/cli/config/set ; Renovate native Yarn Berry support via hostRules (for artifact updating, complementary to this preset) https://docs.renovatebot.com/getting-started/private-packages/#yarn-2 .
